assets.name: 平台：Windows desktop application with Python CLI pipeline support
assets.purpose: run the GUI design tool and command-line development stages from the same project root.

assets.name: 资源：Python modules, JSON schemas, TOML configuration, Markdown documents, Unity project settings, and PyInstaller build output
assets.purpose: make required runtime resources discoverable from .project_root.

assets.name: 运行时：GUI launch, D-stage plugin execution, Concept package export, DevFlow stage execution, preflight checks, tests, and packaging
assets.purpose: support both interactive design work and repeatable command-line validation.

assets.name: 表现：Tkinter desktop shell, stage summaries, validation JSON, Markdown reviews, and command output reports
assets.purpose: surface operational state without hiding machine-readable artifacts.
